mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(c.amount), 0) FROM driving_bill_record b LEFT JOIN driving_pay p ON b.pay_id = p.pay_id LEFT JOIN driving_charge_ltem c ON p.charge_ltem_id = c.charge_ltem_id WHERE p.create_time >= #{startTime} AND p.create_time < #{endTime}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(c.amount), 0) FROM driving_bill_record b LEFT JOIN driving_pay p ON b.pay_id = p.pay_id LEFT JOIN driving_charge_ltem c ON p.charge_ltem_id = c.charge_ltem_id
SELECT SUM(item.amount) AS total_amount FROM driving_pay AS pay LEFT JOIN driving_charge_ltem AS item ON item.charge_ltem_id = pay.charge_ltem_id WHERE pay.user_id = #{userId} AND pay.`status` = '0';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM driving_pay AS pay LEFT JOIN driving_charge_ltem AS item ON item.charge_ltem_id = pay.charge_ltem_id WHERE pay.user_id = #{userId} AND pay.`status` = '0';
